versions.version_description: First of all I made some editions to the text structure to improve the overview. I changed the chord postitions and the chords themselfes.
If anyone wants to improve this submission, I'd be really greatful :) Thank you.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Adam Lambert: Whataya Want From Me


[Intro/Guitar 1] (use the vocals for the pattern)

[tab]    Hey     Slow    Down      What-A--Ya   Want  From  Me
e --10------10-------9--------14--14--14----14----7----7------|
B --12------12------10--------15--15--15----15----8----8------|
G --11------11-------9--------14--14--14----14----7----7------|
D ------------------------------------------------------------|
A ------------------------------------------------------------|
E ------------------------------------------------------------|[/tab]

(MUST: For the Bm & G use a bar chord. For the D use a Power Chord)


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]       
Hey, slow it down whataya want from me [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Whataya want from me [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah I’m afraid whataya want from me [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Whataya want from me [/tab]

[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch] 
There might have been a time   And I would give myself away [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Oooh once upon a time I didn’t give a damn [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
But now, here we are so whataya want from me [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Whataya want from me [/tab]

(Hold G into chorus)


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]          
Just don’t give up I’m workin it out [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]          
Please don’t give in, I won’t let you down [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]          
It messed me up, need a second to breathe [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]                    
Just keep coming around                          [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]         
Hey, whataya want from me   Whataya want from me [/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch] 
Whataya want from me [/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, it’s plain to see (plain to see) that baby you’re beautiful[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
And it’s nothing wrong with you [/tab]
(nothing wrong with you
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
It’s me, I’m a freak (yeah)    but thanks for lovin’ me [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Cause you’re doing it perfectly [/tab]
(it perfectly) 

[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch] 
There might have been a time  When    I    would let you step away [/tab]
DDDD  GG                   DDDD  GG
I wouldn’t even try   But I think you could save my life 


(Hold G into chorus)


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]          
Just don’t give up I’m workin it out [/tab]

It messed me up, need a second to breathe [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]                    
Just keep coming around                          [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]         
Hey, whataya want from me   Whataya want from me [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch] 
Whataya want from me [/tab]


[tab][Mini Solo]
e ----------------------------------------|
B --12-10-12------------------------------|
G --------------11-9-11-------------------|
D -------------------------12-11----------|
A ---------------------------------12-9---|
E ----------------------------------------|[/tab]
[tab]                Just don’t give up on me 
Mini Solo 
e ----------------------------------------|
B --12-10-12------------------------------|
G --------------11-9-11-------------------|
D -------------------------12-11----------|
A ---------------------------------12-9---|
E ----------------------------------------|[/tab]

(uuuuuuh) I won’t let you down 

(Play Intro)
No, I won’t let you down
